data.title: Stablecoin Regulation Urged for Legal Protection and Investment Security
data.description:
According to Foresight News, a member of the legislative committee on the Stablecoin Ordinance, Huang Junshuo, emphasized that stablecoins are digital assets pegged to fiat currencies, with their practical applications still under exploration. Huang advised regulatory bodies to conduct thorough reviews and expedite the licensing process for stablecoin issuers. Publishing a list of licensed issuers would enable the public to invest and use stablecoins with legal protection and regulation.

Huang stressed the importance of investing in stablecoins and digital assets through licensed issuers and trading platforms authorized by the Monetary Authority or the Securities and Futures Commission. This approach ensures that investments are conducted under legal regulations, safeguarding investors' rights.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Signals Imminent Solana Rollout for USD1 Stablecoin
data.description:
World Liberty Financial, a DeFi venture connected to President Donald Trump, is preparing to extend its USD1 stablecoin to the Solana blockchain. On August 29, Charles, who heads the venture’s Solana ecosystem strategy, announced that the move would happen “sooner than you think. ” USD1 Prepares to Enter Solana’s $12 Billion Stablecoin Market The Trump-related DeFi venture co-founder Zach Witkoff later echoed the message in an X post, saying: “Solana here we come. ” At the same time, the company’s official X account also published an image of its logo rebranded in Solana’s signature green and purple colors
source: https://beincrypto.com/world-liberty-financial-usd1-solana-expansion/

data.title: Federal Reserve Enters Quiet Period Ahead of September Meeting
data.description: According to PANews, the Federal Reserve is entering a quiet period before its mid-September meeting, with no board members scheduled to make public appearances until September 7. This marks the beginning of a communication blackout leading up to the crucial meeting. Federal Reserve Governor Christopher Waller's speech on Thursday evening is likely to be the last public statement from the board before the meeting. However, there is still an opportunity to hear from regional Federal Reserve presidents on interest rate policies. Notably, St. Louis Federal Reserve President James Bullard is set to discuss the U.S. economy and monetary policy next Wednesday.

data.title: Bitcoin set for more losses as signs ‘nightmare bear cycle’ emerge
data.description:
Bitcoin’s (BTC) pullback from its all-time high of $124,500 is raising concerns of extended losses, with the asset’s current chart formation showing similarities to the 2021 cycle top that triggered a prolonged bear market. According to insights from popular online cryptocurrency analyst TradingShot, Bitcoin has struggled to regain momentum, with every rally attempt being sold off, and the price slipping below the 50-day moving average (MA). The setup mirrors the same sequence that unfolded four years ago when BTC entered a major downturn, the analyst noted in a TradingView post on August 29. Bitcoin price analysis chart
source: https://finbold.com/bitcoin-set-for-more-losses-as-signs-nightmare-bear-cycle-emerge/

data.title: Elon Musk’s Lawyer To Chair $200 Million DOGE Treasury Company
data.description:
Elon Musk’s longtime attorney Alex Spiro has been named chairman of a new Dogecoin (DOGE) digital asset treasury (DAT) seeking to raise at least $200 million, according to a Fortune report on Friday that cited people familiar with the matter. The initiative, currently being pitched to investors, would create a publicly traded company designed to accumulate Dogecoin on its balance sheet. Investors are closely watching whether the initiative could act as a catalyst for Dogecoin’s price appreciation. Celebrity Lawyer’s Meme Coin Treasury Effort Spiro, a partner at Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, has been identified in investor materials as the planned chairman of the new entity
source: https://beincrypto.com/musk-lawyer-dogecoin-treasury/

data.title: Binance Wallet to Launch 36th Exclusive TGE with Protocol Forest (FOREST)
data.description:
Binance announced on X that Binance Wallet will launch the 36th exclusive TGE with Protocol Forest (FOREST) via PancakeSwap. The subscription period will be September 1, 2025, from 8:00 AM to 10:00 AM (UTC). Eligible users must use Binance Alpha Points to participate and an additional 40,000,000 FOREST for upcoming campaigns. More details on the TGE and the event portal will be announced at a later date
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/29001815294234?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Tether reverses USDT freeze on five blockchains ends issuance and redemption
data.description:
30-8-2025 – Stablecoin issuer Tether has reversed its decision to freeze USDT smart contracts on five blockchain networks following community pushback, allowing token transfers to continue while ending new issuance and redemption services. The policy shift affects users on Omni Layer, Bitcoin Cash SLP, Kusama, EOS, and Algorand networks, where Tether announced Friday it will [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/tether-reverses-usdt-freeze-on-five-blockchains-ends-issuance-and-redemption/
